summary: Frontend verification of the new Global Presence tab on the About Us page + regression on other About tabs and Contact page map. All 9 requirements in the review request passed.

issues: Right column contains an oddly small empty card with only a 'Tornado Tower' caption and a second empty white card below the map area. Not caused by these changes but worth reviewing separately.

critical_code_review_comments: AboutPage.jsx is ~335 lines with a lot of inline data arrays (tradingOffices, originRegions, destinationRegions, commoditiesList, keyFacts, heroImages, sideImages). Consider extracting to /src/data/aboutContent.js for readability and reuse.

AnimatedOfficeMap.jsx uses hard-coded left/top % coordinates for markers. Coordinates were only sanity-checked (Doha ~67% / 43.6%). If pixel accuracy matters, consider a proper geo-projection (e.g., d3-geo) rather than manual tuning.
The right-side legend block uses hard-coded location lists that duplicate data already present in tradingOffices / offices arrays. Deriving them from the same source of truth would prevent drift.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global Presence tab is at /about/global-presence, positioned between Key Facts and Memberships. Verified: tab order, active-tab styling (#8A1538), map title 'Office & Trade-Flow Map', Doha (HQ) marker+label, bottom legend (3 types), right-side intro paragraph + 3 legend groups with testids map-legend-tradingoffices/origination/destinationmarkets, absence of 'How We Operate' panel, full-width sections (Trading Offices 5 cards, Origins 5 cards, Destinations 4 cards, 9 commodity pills), regression on who-we-are/strengths/key-facts/memberships (two-column with side image, no map). Contact page map still shows only Trading + Origination legend and no destination markers (Doha HQ marker present).
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found for the requested scope.
